## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between GrowthX and Hasura teams to explore potential partnership for content strategy and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hasura is rebranding to Promptio, focusing on PromQL (data agent for AI needs)](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy and production using AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Hasura needs immediate help with content strategy, SEO, and migration](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Next steps include connecting with a GrowthX reference (GoAo AI) and reviewing SOW](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

## Topics

### Hasura's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Rebranding from Hasura to Promptio in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Shifting focus to PromQL, a data agent for AI needs](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Requires assistance with SEO, content creation, and website migration](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Current SEO agency provides limited value, mainly technical SEO without strategic guidance](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [End-to-end content strategy and production using AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint to calibrate personas, jobs to be done, and content approach](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Editorial focus with high-quality team (e.g., former TechCrunch editor-in-chief)](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Modular workflows leveraging various AI tools for research, brief creation, and content enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Ability to create diverse content types (blogs, podcasts, webinars) with SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiators

  - [Not a conventional agency or software company](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Owns end-to-end process from strategy to content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Uses AI and automation with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Ability to move quickly and test hypotheses for content performance](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Content strategy development and execution](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [SEO optimization during website migration](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Creation of diverse content types (blogs, podcasts, webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
  - [Ongoing content production and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to connect Hasura team with GoAo AI as a reference customer](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [GrowthX to send Statement of Work (SOW) for review](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss SOW and any questions](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
  - [GrowthX to send email with additional information within 5 minutes of call end](https://fathom.video/share/KJ_tKhBV6FF3gMrnNUKQy1eX9huscMyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
